description: BeetleSense.ai Knowledge Base — 69 curated forestry research, open datasets, satellite/remote sensing, and regulatory sources for RAG retrieval

research_papers.title: Spruce bark beetle, Ips typographus (L.), in Sweden: Monitoring and risk assessment
research_papers.abstract: Comprehensive guide on monitoring Ips typographus outbreaks in Swedish forests, including trap-based monitoring, satellite detection, and risk models based on climate and stand variables.

research_papers.title: Environmental factors affecting European spruce bark beetle (Ips typographus) outbreaks in Sweden
research_papers.abstract: Analysis of environmental drivers (temperature, precipitation, drought indices) affecting bark beetle outbreak dynamics across Swedish forest landscapes. Includes spatial modelling of outbreak risk.

research_papers.title: Larger eight-toothed European spruce bark beetle (Ips typographus) — Biology and management
research_papers.abstract: Detailed reference on Ips typographus biology, life cycle, host tree interactions, detection methods, and integrated pest management strategies. Includes identification guides.

research_papers.title: DroneNet4Beetles — A shared drone data initiative for the early detection of spruce bark beetle outbreaks
research_papers.abstract: Multi-institutional initiative combining drone-captured RGB and multispectral imagery with machine learning for early-stage bark beetle detection. Includes benchmark datasets and detection algorithms.

research_papers.title: Conditions for continuous cover forestry and definition of closer-to-nature forest management in Sweden
research_papers.abstract: Official Swedish Forest Agency guidelines on continuous cover forestry (CCF) practices, definitions, and regulatory framework for sustainable forest management in Sweden.

research_papers.title: Integrated Systems for Forest and Agricultural Health: A Global Framework for Monitoring, Management, and Digital Surveillance
research_papers.abstract: Framework for integrating satellite, drone, and ground-based monitoring systems for forest and agricultural health assessment at scale. Covers sensor fusion, AI-based analysis, and early warning systems.

research_papers.title: Agricultural Computer Vision Dataset Survey
research_papers.abstract: Curated survey of 45+ RGB image datasets for computer vision in agriculture and forestry, including weed detection, disease identification, crop monitoring, and tree species classification.

research_papers.title: Forestry Management in Sweden — Earth Observation for Sustainable Development
research_papers.institution: European Association of Remote Sensing Companies
research_papers.abstract: Overview of how Earth observation technologies (Sentinel-2, LiDAR, radar) are applied to forestry management in Sweden, including case studies on beetle damage detection and timber volume estimation.

research_papers.title: Combining empirical and mechanistic understanding of spruce bark beetle outbreak dynamics in the LPJ-GUESS (v4.1)
research_papers.abstract: Integration of empirical bark beetle outbreak data with the LPJ-GUESS dynamic vegetation model to simulate and predict outbreak dynamics under climate change scenarios. Combines phenology, host susceptibility, and population dynamics.

research_papers.title: Quantifying the probability of bark beetle induced damage in central German Norway spruce forests
research_papers.abstract: Statistical model for quantifying bark beetle damage probability in Norway spruce stands based on stand structure, climate variables, and landscape connectivity. Applicable to Scandinavian forests.

research_papers.title: A Review of Google Earth Engine for Land Use and Land Cover Change Analysis: Trends, Applications, and Challenges
research_papers.abstract: Comprehensive review of Google Earth Engine applications for land use and land cover change analysis, covering forest monitoring, deforestation detection, and vegetation health assessment at scale.

research_papers.title: An Assessment of Global Forest Change Datasets for National Forest Monitoring and Reporting
research_papers.abstract: Assessment of major global forest change datasets (Hansen, JAXA, ESA) for use in national-level forest monitoring and reporting, comparing accuracy, resolution, and temporal coverage.

research_papers.title: Assessing the impacts of forest cover change on carbon stock and soil moisture dynamics using geospatial techniques
research_papers.abstract: Case study using geospatial techniques to assess impacts of forest cover change on carbon stock and soil moisture dynamics. Methods applicable to Swedish forest health monitoring.

research_papers.title: Policy Evaluation and Monitoring of Agricultural Expansion in Forests in Myanmar: An Integrated Approach of Remote Sensing Techniques and Social Surveys
research_papers.abstract: Integrated framework combining remote sensing with social surveys for policy evaluation on forest-agriculture transitions. Methodology reference for monitoring land use changes affecting Swedish forests.

research_papers.title: Research progress on multimodal data fusion in forest resource monitoring
research_papers.abstract: Review of multimodal data fusion approaches for forest resource monitoring, including LiDAR + optical, radar + multispectral, and drone + satellite integration techniques.

research_papers.title: Global Analytical Architectures for Terrestrial Monitoring: Advanced Sensors, Datasets, and Computational Frameworks in Forestry and Agriculture
research_papers.abstract: Overview of advanced sensor technologies, open datasets, and computational frameworks for terrestrial monitoring in forestry and agriculture, including edge computing and cloud-based analytics.

research_papers.title: Next-Generation Climate-Smart Forestry: Integrating Digital Twins, AI, IoT, Remote Sensing, and Ecosystem Modelling for Resilience
research_papers.abstract: Framework for next-generation climate-smart forestry integrating digital twins, artificial intelligence, IoT sensor networks, remote sensing, and ecosystem modelling for forest resilience and adaptive management.

research_papers.title: Fires Drove Record-breaking Tropical Forest Loss in 2024
research_papers.abstract: Analysis of record-breaking tropical forest loss in 2024 driven by fires, with data from Global Forest Watch. Methodology and satellite monitoring approaches applicable to boreal forest fire detection.

research_papers.title: Global Forest Loss Shatters Records in 2024, Fueled by Massive Fires
research_papers.abstract: Press release and data summary on record global forest loss in 2024. Includes methodology for satellite-based forest loss detection and monitoring systems.

research_papers.title: Satellite Tech And AI Revolutionize Farming In 2026
research_papers.abstract: Overview of how satellite technology and AI are revolutionizing agriculture and forestry in 2026, covering precision monitoring, predictive analytics, and automated decision support systems.

open_datasets.title: Riksskogstaxeringen — Swedish National Forest Inventory
open_datasets.description: Sweden's official national forest inventory, providing statistics on growing stock, species distribution, increment, age class distribution, and damage assessments across all Swedish forests. Continuous inventory since 1923.

open_datasets.title: Environmental data MVM — SLU Open Data Portal
open_datasets.description: SLU's environmental monitoring and assessment data including soil chemistry, water quality, biodiversity surveys, and forest health indicators across Swedish landscapes.

open_datasets.title: Search for open environmental data — SLU
open_datasets.description: Portal for discovering and accessing SLU's open environmental datasets covering forest ecology, soil science, water systems, and agricultural landscapes in Sweden.

open_datasets.title: Digital soil map of arable land in Sweden
open_datasets.description: High-resolution digital soil maps for Swedish arable land including soil type, texture, organic carbon content, and pH. Critical input for root rot risk modelling and forest health assessment.

open_datasets.title: GBIF Sweden — Global Biodiversity Information Facility
open_datasets.description: Free and open access to biodiversity occurrence data for Sweden, including tree species distribution, wildlife sightings, and invertebrate records. Essential for species identification validation.

open_datasets.title: Swedish Biodiversity Data Infrastructure (SBDI)
open_datasets.description: Sweden's national infrastructure for open access to biodiversity data, integrating data from GBIF, citizen science, museum collections, and research institutions.

open_datasets.title: ICP Forests — International Co-operative Programme on Assessment and Monitoring of Air Pollution Effects on Forests
open_datasets.description: Pan-European forest health monitoring programme with data on crown condition, soil chemistry, tree growth, and deposition across 40+ countries including Sweden.

open_datasets.title: GlobalTreeSearch — Botanic Gardens Conservation International
open_datasets.description: Comprehensive database of over 60,000 tree species with native range, conservation status, and distribution data. Reference for species identification validation.

open_datasets.title: Data from: A database for global soil health assessment
open_datasets.description: Global soil health indicators database including biological, chemical, and physical soil parameters. Used for contextualizing Swedish soil data and root rot risk models.

open_datasets.title: Precision agricultural data and ecosystem services
open_datasets.description: Research dataset linking precision agriculture measurements with ecosystem service assessments, including forest-agriculture interface monitoring methodologies.

open_datasets.title: Aboveground Biomass Density for High Latitude Forests from ICESat-2, 2020
open_datasets.description: Aboveground biomass density estimates for high-latitude forests derived from ICESat-2 LiDAR altimetry data. Directly applicable to Swedish boreal forest timber volume estimation and carbon stock assessment.

open_datasets.title: Agricultural Pests Image Dataset
open_datasets.description: Labelled image dataset of agricultural pests for computer vision model training. Reference for BeetleSense pest identification module training data methodology.

open_datasets.title: Agricultural Stress Index System (ASIS)
open_datasets.description: Global system for monitoring vegetation stress using satellite-derived vegetation health indices. Methodology applicable to forest stress detection and bark beetle outbreak early warning.

open_datasets.title: Cropland Data Layer
open_datasets.description: Annual crop-specific land cover dataset using satellite imagery classification. Methodology reference for Swedish land cover classification and forest type mapping.

open_datasets.title: Dataset Catalog — Data.gov
open_datasets.description: US government open data portal with environmental, agricultural, and forestry datasets. Reference for comparable Swedish open data integration patterns.

open_datasets.title: soil-health — Dataset Catalog — Data.gov
open_datasets.description: Curated soil health datasets from US government sources including NRCS soil surveys, soil organic carbon measurements, and biological indicators.

open_datasets.title: Global Forest Watch Open Data Portal
open_datasets.description: Open data portal for global forest monitoring datasets including tree cover loss, fire alerts, deforestation drivers, and forest carbon flux data.

open_datasets.title: Forest Loss — Global Forest Review
open_datasets.description: Global forest loss statistics and interactive visualizations from WRI, including country-level data, driver analysis, and trend monitoring.

open_datasets.title: Vegetation and Forests — ORNL DAAC
open_datasets.description: NASA ORNL DAAC collection of vegetation and forest datasets including LAI, FPAR, biomass, and phenology data from multiple satellite missions.

open_datasets.title: SMAP — Soil Moisture Active Passive
open_datasets.description: NASA SMAP mission providing global soil moisture measurements at high temporal resolution. Critical input for forest drought stress monitoring and bark beetle outbreak risk prediction.

open_datasets.title: Soil Moisture Active Passive Data (SMAP) — NSIDC
open_datasets.description: NSIDC-hosted SMAP Level 3 and 4 soil moisture data products including freeze/thaw state and root zone soil moisture. Key data source for forest water stress models.

open_datasets.title: GEOGLAM Crop Monitor
open_datasets.description: International crop monitoring initiative providing open satellite-based assessments of growing conditions and crop production forecasts. Methodology applicable to forest health monitoring.

open_datasets.title: JRC MARS Bulletin — Joint Research Centre
open_datasets.description: JRC MARS crop yield forecasting system using remote sensing and meteorological data. Methodology reference for forest growth and yield prediction models.

open_datasets.title: The MARS Crop Yield Forecasting System — Introduction by JRC
open_datasets.description: Technical documentation of the JRC MARS crop yield forecasting system architecture. Reference for building analogous forest productivity forecasting modules.

satellite_platforms.title: Google Earth Engine
satellite_platforms.description: Cloud-based geospatial analysis platform with petabytes of satellite imagery and geospatial datasets. Used for large-scale forest change detection and NDVI time-series analysis.

satellite_platforms.title: Landsat — NASA Science
satellite_platforms.description: Longest-running Earth observation satellite program providing continuous 30m resolution imagery since 1972. Essential for long-term forest change detection and historical analysis.

satellite_platforms.title: Landsat is Vital to American Agriculture, Forests — NASA
satellite_platforms.description: NASA documentation on Landsat applications in agriculture and forestry, including forest health monitoring, timber volume estimation, and land cover classification.

satellite_platforms.title: Landsat program — Wikipedia
satellite_platforms.description: Reference documentation on Landsat program history, sensor specifications, band configurations, and data access methods.

satellite_platforms.title: First applications from Sentinel-2A — ESA
satellite_platforms.description: ESA documentation on first Sentinel-2A applications including vegetation monitoring, forest mapping, and land cover change detection at 10m resolution.

satellite_platforms.title: Sentinel-1 — NASA Earthdata
satellite_platforms.description: C-band SAR satellite providing all-weather, day-and-night imagery. Used for forest structure mapping, change detection, and soil moisture estimation in Swedish forests.

satellite_platforms.title: Satellite Remote Sensing for Agricultural Applications — NASA Earthdata
satellite_platforms.description: NASA guide to satellite remote sensing applications in agriculture and forestry, covering sensor selection, data access, and analysis workflows.

satellite_platforms.title: Sensing soil moisture for better crops — NSIDC
satellite_platforms.description: NSIDC guide on using satellite-based soil moisture data for agricultural and forestry applications, including drought monitoring and irrigation management.

satellite_platforms.title: NOAA's Satellite Applications Symposium Series: Land and Agriculture — NESDIS
satellite_platforms.description: NOAA symposium documentation on satellite applications for land and agriculture monitoring, including vegetation health indices, drought monitoring, and fire detection.

satellite_platforms.title: Commercial Satellite Imagery with Planet
satellite_platforms.description: Planet Labs commercial satellite constellation providing daily 3-5m resolution imagery globally. Used for high-frequency forest change monitoring and rapid response to beetle outbreaks.

satellite_platforms.title: Precision Agriculture Imaging with Planet Satellite Solutions
satellite_platforms.description: Planet Labs precision agriculture products including NDVI analytics, change detection, and field-level monitoring at daily revisit rates.

satellite_platforms.title: Pléiades — Very High-Resolution (50cm) Satellites Imagery — Airbus Intelligence
satellite_platforms.description: Airbus Pléiades constellation providing 50cm resolution optical imagery. Used for individual tree crown delineation and precise beetle damage mapping.

satellite_platforms.title: CSDA Vendor — Maxar — NASA Earthdata
satellite_platforms.description: Maxar commercial satellite imagery (WorldView, GeoEye) providing sub-meter resolution. Reference for very-high-resolution forest inventory and damage assessment.

satellite_platforms.title: Global Forest Watch — FAO
satellite_platforms.description: FAO and WRI collaborative platform for near-real-time forest monitoring using satellite data, including deforestation alerts, fire monitoring, and tree cover change.

regulatory_documents.title: Forest Service Handbook 1909.12 — Land Management Planning
regulatory_documents.description: Comprehensive handbook on forest land management planning, inventory methods, and monitoring protocols. Methodology reference for BeetleSense survey design.

regulatory_documents.title: Fundamentals of Sustainable Agriculture
regulatory_documents.description: Core principles of sustainable forestry and agriculture including soil conservation, integrated pest management, and ecosystem-based management approaches.

regulatory_documents.title: Whole Farm Conservation Best Practices Manual
regulatory_documents.description: Best practices for whole-farm conservation including forest buffer zones, biodiversity corridors, water management, and integrated land use planning.

technology_references.title: Smart Farming Data 2024 (SF24)
technology_references.description: Benchmark dataset for smart farming applications including drone imagery analysis, sensor data fusion, and crop/forest health assessment using machine learning.

technology_references.title: SmartFarmingLab field dataset survey — 45 RGB image datasets for agricultural CV
technology_references.description: Curated collection of 45 high-quality RGB image datasets for weed detection, disease identification, and crop monitoring in natural field scenes. GIL 2025 survey paper companion.

technology_references.title: crop-monitoring — GitHub Topics
technology_references.description: Collection of open-source tools and repositories for crop and forest monitoring using satellite imagery, drone data, and IoT sensors.

technology_references.title: iNaturalist
technology_references.description: Community-powered species identification platform using AI image recognition. Reference for BeetleSense tree and pest species identification module accuracy benchmarking.

app_references.title: 15 Fun Nature Apps to Use in Your Forest
app_references.description: Overview of consumer-facing nature and forestry apps including tree identification, forest management tools, and biodiversity recording applications. Competitive landscape reference.

app_references.title: Essential Forestry Apps & Tips — Vermont Woodlands Association
app_references.description: Curated list of essential forestry management apps for landowners including timber cruising, GPS mapping, and forest inventory tools. Feature comparison for BeetleSense positioning.

app_references.title: Tree Identification Apps — N.C. Tree Farm Program
app_references.description: Comparison of tree identification apps including AI-based recognition, accuracy benchmarks, and user experience evaluation.

app_references.title: Testing Plant Identification Apps — Which Is Best?
app_references.description: Independent testing and accuracy comparison of plant/tree identification apps. Benchmark data for BeetleSense vision identification module accuracy targets.
